detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	114學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 英文(二) (English(ll))	開課班級 : 日大學英文	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 吳唯邦	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
1. Develop deeper understanding and multi-faceted perceptions of the world's cultures. 2. Explore, think, and then present to the class our response to the topic of the week. 3. Develop critical reading and thinking skills. 4. Appreciate major themes in the textbook and diversified cultures. 5. Use and familiarize yourself with the vocabulary of the week's topic in class presentation. 


2.教學綱要
English(II) is a course for freshmen. Students will read and analyze cultures around the globe by employing a variety of vocabulary.
In this class, participants will examine values and attitudes toward cultures through topic of the week. We will study how culture is represented by reading and sharing our thoughts on the wide spectrum of topics provided by the textbook.
 


3.教科書
2	書名 : Reading Explorer 3　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : Nancy Douglas　出版社 : Cengage Learning　版本 :  


4.參考書

作者 : 李家同，海柏　出版社 : 聯經出版公司　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Quizzes, class participation and presentation: 40%; Midterm: 30%; Final exam: 30%; 
All work must be completed to pass the course. Late work will not be graded unless you’ve made prior arrangements with me.Students must bring to class the textbook. 
We are all responsible for maintaining a good learning ambiance for the class. When you enter the classroom, make sure you have already set your cellphones on silent mode. 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：中
